components.notes: REDEPLOYED fresh from main 2026-07-18 — stale-build fixed (leaderboard now JSON, RSS live, canonicals current). Canonical domains are posttrainllm.com and www.posttrainllm.com; the platform-generated tinygpt.pages.dev hostname is not a custom fallback. CF project name stays 'tinygpt' (cosmetic).
the hub
Current API and legacy cockpit worker domains; fleet.sassmaker.com is the private Foundry target after an explicit parity cutover.
Next/OpenNext on Workers
canonical = ratings.highsignal.app; everythingrated.com is NOT ours (external) — do not associate
own bet; hosted on SH domain

'Private Agent Search' — public landing at knowledgebase.sassmaker.com, app/search surface at search.sassmaker.com, plus fleet shared RAG service (Vectorize/D1/R2). Pages deployment is Git-connected to sass-maker/knowledge-base.
apex/hub
project auto-named chess-9a0
name collision risk (PLAID KARTE)
Aliveville world-sim; parked but live (user: leave)
reel→Rust rewrite
live at protein.significanthobbies.com
tooling/experimental
Scored catalog of SaaS ideas. 2026-07-18: repo moved sarthakagrawal927 -> sass-maker org + cloned into fleet; Pages project is GitHub-connected and ideas.sassmaker.com is active/200.

NEW 2026-07-18 (was 'bodyplay' — renamed to Motion). Body-motion game controller. v1 = SERVERLESS single-device POC: iPhone runs camera+Vision pose → renders the game full-screen in a WKWebView (reuses web/ game via in-process JS pose bridge) → screen-mirror to a TV (AirPlay/Chromecast/QuickTime); recording via ReplayKit (game+camera inset in one video). Monorepo: protocol/ + web/ (Vite game SDK + Game iface, keyboard-debug playable, bridge+socket transports) + ios/ (SwiftUI+Vision+WKWebView+ReplayKit, XcodeGen) + server/ (PartyKit relay, PARKED for v2). v2 = browser display + Chromecast receiver + PartyKit multiplayer. Web+server typecheck+build green; iOS COMPILES + LAUNCHES + renders on iOS-27 Simulator (Xcode 27, verified via screenshot) — device-runtime (real camera/ReplayKit/joint-mapping) still needs a physical iPhone. Repo = PERSONAL GitHub github.com/sarthakagrawal927/motion (private), NOT fleet org.
out-of-fleet per AGENTS.md but live + registered
Pages project deleted 2026-07-18 (purged 126 deployments then project)
Live product at historia.aliveville.com (aliveville family) — NOT an orphan; keep.
personal site, not a fleet product
Private Foundry cockpit; current manual-host parity must be verified before activation from this repository.
Blume package documentation; deploy remains an explicit operator action.
Public indexed skill catalog; deploy remains an explicit operator action.

packages.name: @saas-maker/landing-page
packages.description: Foundry — workshop dossier landing page (sassmaker.com). Pure static Astro port of the original Next.js site.

packages.name: cockpit-landing-astro
packages.description: Static Astro port of the SaaS Maker Cockpit login shell (`/`). Overlaid into `.open-next/assets/index.html` so anon GET / is served from the Workers ASSETS binding.

packages.description: App-local Apple Speech and AVFAudio Expo module

packages.description: Official SaaS Maker SDK with key-only App Health instrumentation and drop-in backend services for SaaS applications.

packages.name: reel-pipeline
packages.description: Control-plane-friendly reel generation pipeline for SaaS Maker marketing queue items.

packages.name: psi-swarm-monorepo
packages.description: Lighthouse, run many times across realistic device/network presets. See the p50/p75/p90/p99 of your Web Vitals, not one noisy point.

packages.name: psi-swarm
packages.description: Run Lighthouse N times across realistic device/network presets. Get p50/p75/p90/p99 of your Web Vitals instead of a single noisy number.
